name: philips-filament-design-toolkit
description: Philips Filament Design System — component mapping, implementation, icon lookup, and prop discovery for React apps using @filament/react

hooks.prompt: Check if $ARGUMENTS contains a .tsx or .jsx file edit. If so, verify: (1) All @filament/react imports use the barrel import pattern, not individual package paths like @filament/button-react. (2) All @filament-icons/react imports use PascalCase named exports. (3) No generic HTML elements (like <button>, <input>, <select>) are used where a Filament equivalent exists (Button, TextField, Dropdown). Return ok:true if the file is not tsx/jsx OR if all checks pass. Return ok:false with reason if a Filament import or usage pattern is wrong.
